general.label: General
general.title: General Settings
general.server_port_change: The listening port has been changed, Please restart the application for the changes to take effect
general.proxy_change: The proxy has been changed, Restart the application for the changes to take effect
general.proxy_error: Please fill in the host and port

hotkey.label: Hotkey
hotkey.title: Hotkey Settings
hotkey.doubletap_tip: Press a key to set, Backspace to clear

backup.label: Backup
backup.title: Backup Settings
backup.aliyun_login_first: Please scan the code to log in first.
backup.empty: You have not backed up yet

account.label: Account
account.title: Account
account.login_desc: Log in to unlock more AI features
account.payment_auto_refresh_success: Payment confirmed and membership status refreshed
account.payment_status_failed_notice: Payment failed. Please try again or use another provider
account.payment_status_refunded_notice: Order was refunded and the billing profile was refreshed
account.payment_provider_required: Please choose a payment provider first
account.payment_qr_desc: Scan the QR code in the payment app, and the membership status will refresh automatically after success
account.payment_cancel_order_hint: This will send a close request to the payment platform. Paid or terminal orders cannot be canceled.
account.payment_polling: Waiting for payment confirmation. Order status is refreshing automatically
account.invite_pending_count_help: To ensure fair use of platform resources, invite rewards are issued after the invited user completes a top-up of any amount.
account.billing_region_hint: Switch pricing and payment flow between regions.
account.quota_card_hint: After the daily quota is used up, credits can keep AI access going.
account.subscription_subtitle: Purchase or renew a plan here. Renewal stacks from the current expiry time
account.subscription_not_ready: No benefit plans are available yet
account.subscription_credit_fallback: Extra usage can fall back to bonus credits
account.subscription_free_feature: Included by default, no purchase required
account.subscription_tier_free_desc: Best for light usage, with a basic AI quota for everyday tasks
account.subscription_tier_basic_desc: A solid fit for frequent daily use and regular productivity workflows
account.subscription_tier_pro_desc: Built for heavy creation and demanding workflows with more generous AI limits
account.subscription_renewal_note: If your current subscription is still active, the newly purchased duration will extend from the existing expiry time
account.credit_topup_subtitle: Buy credits for extra usage and uninterrupted access.
account.admin_subtitle: Use an admin token to query orders, issue refunds, and suspend or resume memberships
account.admin_token_hint: Stored only in local device storage. Keep it safe.
account.admin_token_required: Please enter an admin token first
account.admin_order_subtitle: Query an order by ID and issue a refund for paid orders
account.admin_order_refund_pending: Refund submitted and waiting for provider confirmation
account.admin_order_refund_duplicate: This order's refund rollback was already processed
account.admin_order_refund_missing_snapshot: This subscription order is missing a historical snapshot and needs manual handling
account.admin_order_refund_later_subscription: A newer subscription exists after this order, so automatic rollback was blocked
account.admin_membership_subtitle: Inspect any user's billing profile by user ID or email, then suspend or resume membership status
account.admin_tier_subtitle: Change a user's package directly by user ID or email. Leave extra days blank to keep the current expiry.
account.admin_tier_duration_hint: If the target is a paid tier and the user has no active subscription, please enter days here.
account.admin_requires_order_id: Please enter an order ID first
account.admin_requires_user_id: Please enter a target user ID or email first

ai.label: AI Features
ai.title: AI Features
ai.api_tip: API settings moved to Service → AI Services tab
ai.pref_desc: This text will be appended to the System Prompt for each AI Polish session to better match your writing style.
ai.hash_trigger_desc: Automatically triggers AI Polish when copying text ending with #
ai.show_toolbar_desc: Turn off to open translation window directly
ai.prompt_empty: Leave empty to use default prompt
ai.toolbar_enable_desc: Disable to hide all prompts after text selection
ai.trigger_hotkey_tip: Configure the 'Text Selection' hotkey in Hotkey Settings to specify the toolbar trigger key.

login.subtitle: Text Selection · AI Analysis
login.email_hint: Common email providers only, used for password recovery
login.reg_password_hint: 8+ characters with numbers, lowercase and uppercase
login.invite_code_hint: Fill in a friend's invite code to bind the referral
login.error_password_length: Password must be at least 8 characters
login.error_password_no_number: Password must contain at least one number
login.error_password_no_lowercase: Password must contain at least one lowercase letter
login.error_password_no_uppercase: Password must contain at least one uppercase letter
login.send_success: Code sent, please check your email

reset.title: Reset Password
reset.description: Enter your email to receive verification code
reset.password_hint: Password requirements: 8+ characters, including numbers, lowercase and uppercase letters
reset.error_password_length: Password must be at least 8 characters
reset.error_password_no_number: Password must contain at least one number
reset.error_password_no_lowercase: Password must contain at least one lowercase letter
reset.error_password_no_uppercase: Password must contain at least one uppercase letter
reset.send_success: Verification code sent, please check your email

history.error_no_api_key: Please configure API Key in Service → AI Services
history.error_insufficient: Insufficient history (< 3 records) to generate report

ai_config.title: AI Services
ai_config.url_desc: Compatible with OpenAI API format (SiliconFlow, DeepSeek, etc.)
ai_config.test_error_fields: Please fill in API URL, API Key and model name
ai_config.service_section_desc: Manage the AI chat and text model services used by the app.
ai_config.text_section_desc: This configuration is used by AI chat, explain, and light AI features.
ai_config.speech_section_desc: Built-in speech lives here. Read aloud defaults to Volcengine, and can optionally follow the custom voice provider you select below.
ai_config.speech_service_item_desc: Edit the built-in speech and read aloud settings.
ai_config.speech_general_desc: Choose whether read aloud should keep the default Volcengine voice or follow the custom provider configured here.
ai_config.speech_use_for_read_aloud: Use this voice configuration for read aloud
ai_config.speech_volcengine_desc: Configure the built-in Volcengine TTS service for default read aloud.
ai_config.speech_openai_desc: Configure the built-in OpenAI TTS service. Leave URL or key empty to reuse the first enabled compatible AI service when appropriate.
ai_config.speech_openai_url_desc: Leave empty to reuse the first enabled AI API URL and auto-convert it to /audio/speech when possible.
ai_config.speech_openai_key_desc: Leave empty to reuse the first enabled AI API key when available.
ai_config.speech_openai_instructions_placeholder: Optional voice style guidance, such as calm, warm, or energetic.

updater.title: Check Update
updater.installed: Install completed, Restart the application for the changes to take effect

ollama.title: Ollama
ollama.install_ollama: Unable to connect to local ollama, please download, install and start ollama first. If you use ollama that is not on this machine, please change the request address.
ollama.not_installed: This model has not been installed yet, click to download and install now
ollama.supported_models: Click to see a list of Ollama available models
ollama.prompt_description: By customizing the Prompt, you can customize the behavior of AI. $text $from $to $detect will be replaced with the text to be translated, source language, target language and detected language.
